turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Excuse me, I'd like to make an appointment to see a doctor.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. What seems to be the reason for your visit today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Because I feel my mind seem to have a sick, and I am not sure should the doctor have free time tomorrow, so I call this phone to confirm.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand. You’re not feeling well mentally and want to check if the doctor is available tomorrow, right? Which doctor would you like to see — a general practitioner or a mental health specialist?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Actually, I think it's just, it's like a head, but I think maybe my mental health should be seen, because when I arrive in Melbourne, I think I feel very lonely and always feel upset.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I see. It sounds like you’ve been feeling quite down since moving to Melbourne. I’m sorry you’re going through that. Would you like me to book you with a psychologist or a general doctor first for an initial check-up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I think it's necessary. And do you have some famous doctors recommend?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. We have a few well-known psychologists who specialize in adjustment and mood concerns. Would you prefer someone male or female, or is either fine?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Maybe mail is better.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. We have Dr. James Porter and Dr. Michael Lin — both experienced in mental health support for newcomers. Would you like an appointment with one of them?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, thank you. Sorry, I kept a message. Let's see. Tomorrow I have an English learning class. Can I put the date down to that day after tomorrow?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, that’s no problem. So you’d like to book the appointment for the day after tomorrow — would you prefer morning or afternoon?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: もしかしたら、朝? i said English but i do not know it shows Japanese

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, morning is fine. Would around 10 a.m. work for you, or would you prefer a little earlier or later?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, the timing is very suitable for me. I can get up as normal, and also, I think today I need some medical. What type of medical you can recommend to me?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Since you’re feeling emotionally low and a bit unwell, I’d suggest a basic health check first — to rule out any physical causes — and then a mental health consultation. Would you like to have both at the same clinic on the same day?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If I can solve them in the same day, it's better.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. I’ll schedule you for a morning general check-up first, followed by the session with Dr. Porter. Could I have your full name, please, to confirm the booking?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 볼킹 확인 완료. 감사합니다. i say english but i do not know why it shows Korean

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: 좋아요, 감사합니다. 😊 예약이 완료되었습니다. 그럼 이틀 뒤 아침 10시에 뵙겠습니다. 혹시 방문 전에 궁금한 점 있으신가요?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. Thank you. That's real help.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome. I’m glad I could help. Take care, and we’ll see you at your appointment.
